title: Reconnect with a Friend
description: Reach out to someone you haven't spoken to in a while. Send a voice note, call, or plan a catch-up.
tips: Pick someone who makes you feel energized
A quick voice note counts — it doesn't have to be a long call
Share something positive from your week
goldHint: Screenshot of the conversation or a selfie together
validationPrompt: User should show evidence of reaching out to a friend — a chat screenshot, selfie, or call log.

title: Compliment a Stranger
description: Give a genuine compliment to someone you encounter today — a barista, coworker, or fellow commuter.
tips: Be specific — mention what you actually noticed
Smile and make eye contact
Don't expect anything in return, just spread warmth
goldHint: A note or selfie from the moment
validationPrompt: User should describe or show evidence of giving a genuine compliment to someone.

title: Cozy Check-In
description: Send a thoughtful message to someone you care about. Ask how they're really doing.
tips: Keep it low-pressure — a text is perfect
Ask an open-ended question
Listen more than you share
goldHint: Screenshot of the caring message exchange
validationPrompt: User should show a caring message sent to someone they care about.

title: Warm Comfort Ritual
description: Create a cozy self-care moment: a warm bath, hot water bottle, heated blanket, or warm drink with intention.
tips: Add lavender or chamomile for extra calm
Put your phone on Do Not Disturb
Set a timer so you can fully relax without watching the clock
goldHint: Photo of your cozy setup
validationPrompt: User should show their warm comfort setup — a bath, hot drink, blanket, or similar cozy ritual.

title: Skincare Reset
description: Do a full skincare routine — cleanse, mask, moisturize. Take your time and enjoy the process.
tips: Your skin is most receptive during the follicular phase
Try a hydrating or brightening mask
Play calm music while you wait for the mask
goldHint: Selfie with your mask on or your glowing skin after
validationPrompt: User should show a selfie during or after their skincare routine.

title: Digital Sunset
description: Put all screens away 30 minutes before bed. Read, journal, or just breathe.
tips: Set an alarm to remind you when to start
Prepare a book or journal in advance
Dim the lights to signal wind-down time
goldHint: Photo of your screen-free setup or journal page
validationPrompt: User should show their screen-free wind-down setup — a book, journal, or dim-lit room.

title: Express Yourself
description: Create something — draw, paint, write a poem, compose a playlist, style an outfit, or rearrange a space.
tips: Don't aim for perfection — aim for expression
Set a 15-minute timer and just go
Your creative energy peaks during ovulation — ride the wave
goldHint: Photo of your creation
validationPrompt: User should show a creative output — artwork, writing, playlist screenshot, styled outfit, or rearranged space.

title: Vision Board Moment
description: Spend 10 minutes creating a mini vision board — digital or physical. Collect images that inspire your goals.
tips: Pinterest or a notes app work great for digital boards
Focus on how you want to feel, not just what you want
Include at least one bold dream
goldHint: Screenshot or photo of your vision board
validationPrompt: User should show a vision board — digital or physical — with collected inspiring images.

title: Stream of Consciousness
description: Write freely for 5 minutes. No editing, no rules. Let whatever comes out flow onto the page.
tips: Use paper — the tactile feel helps during low energy
There's no wrong way to do this
If you're stuck, start with 'Right now I feel...'
goldHint: Photo of your written page (content can be private)
validationPrompt: User should show a photo of their handwritten or typed free-writing page.

title: Dance It Out
description: Put on your favorite upbeat song and dance for the full duration. No choreography needed — just move.
tips: Close the door if you need privacy
Pick a song that makes you feel powerful
Let your body lead — don't think, just move
goldHint: A short video clip or sweaty selfie
validationPrompt: User should show evidence of dancing — a video clip, sweaty selfie, or screenshot of the song they danced to.

title: Sunrise Walk
description: Take a 15-minute walk outside, ideally in morning light. Focus on your surroundings — no phone scrolling.
tips: Morning light helps regulate your circadian rhythm
Notice three things you can see, hear, and feel
Walk at a pace that feels energizing, not exhausting
goldHint: Photo from your walk — scenery, shadow, or step count
validationPrompt: User should show evidence of an outdoor walk — a nature photo, step count, or outdoor selfie.

title: Gentle Stretch
description: Do 5 minutes of gentle stretching. Focus on hips, lower back, and shoulders — areas that hold tension.
tips: Child's pose and cat-cow are great starting points
Breathe deeply into each stretch
Use a pillow or blanket for extra comfort
goldHint: Photo of your stretching setup or a post-stretch selfie
validationPrompt: User should show their stretching setup — a yoga mat, pillow arrangement, or post-stretch selfie.

title: Grounding Walk
description: Take a slow, mindful walk. Focus on the sensation of your feet touching the ground with each step.
tips: Leave your headphones behind for this one
Walk slower than you think you should
If possible, walk on grass or natural terrain
goldHint: Photo from your walk or a shot of where you walked
validationPrompt: User should show evidence of a mindful walk — a path photo, nature shot, or step count.

title: Body Scan Rest
description: Lie down and do a 5-minute body scan. Start from your toes and slowly move attention up to the crown of your head.
tips: Use a guided body scan if you're new to this
It's okay to fall asleep — your body might need it
Place a hand on your belly to anchor your attention
goldHint: Photo of your resting setup or a timer screenshot
validationPrompt: User should show their resting setup — a cozy spot, timer, or meditation app screenshot.

title: Gratitude Snapshot
description: Take a photo of something you're grateful for today. Write one sentence about why it matters to you.
tips: Look for beauty in ordinary moments
It can be as simple as your morning coffee
Save it somewhere you'll see it later
goldHint: The gratitude photo with your written reason
validationPrompt: User should show a photo of something they're grateful for, ideally with a brief note about why.

title: Breathing Anchor
description: Practice box breathing for 3 minutes: inhale 4 counts, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4. Repeat.
tips: Place one hand on your chest and one on your belly
If 4 counts feels long, start with 3
This activates your parasympathetic nervous system
goldHint: Screenshot of a breathing timer or a calm selfie after
validationPrompt: User should show evidence of breathing practice — a timer, breathing app screenshot, or calm selfie.

title: Iron-Rich Comfort Meal
description: Prepare or order a meal rich in iron — spinach, lentils, red meat, or dark chocolate. Nourish your body.
tips: Pair iron-rich foods with vitamin C for better absorption
Dark chocolate counts — enjoy it guilt-free
Warm meals feel extra comforting during this phase
goldHint: Photo of your iron-rich meal
validationPrompt: User should show a photo of their iron-rich meal or snack.

title: Colorful Plate Challenge
description: Make a meal with at least 4 different colors of whole foods. Think rainbow — the more variety, the better.
tips: Berries, greens, sweet potato, and avocado are easy wins
Fresh is great but frozen veggies count too
Arrange it nicely — eating with your eyes first is real
goldHint: Photo of your colorful plate
validationPrompt: User should show a photo of a meal with at least 4 different colored whole foods.

title: Hydration Hero
description: Drink at least 8 glasses of water today. Add lemon, cucumber, or mint to make it feel special.
tips: Start your day with a full glass before coffee
Set hourly reminders if you tend to forget
Herbal teas count toward your water intake
goldHint: Photo of your infused water or hydration tracker screenshot
validationPrompt: User should show their hydration setup — infused water bottle, tracker app, or tally marks.

title: Magnesium Moment
description: Have a magnesium-rich snack — dark chocolate, almonds, banana, or pumpkin seeds. Your body craves it this phase.
tips: Magnesium helps with PMS symptoms and sleep
A small handful of almonds is enough
Pair with herbal tea for a calming combo
goldHint: Photo of your magnesium-rich snack
validationPrompt: User should show a photo of their magnesium-rich snack or treat.
